Home.tagline: A nomadic photo and video production studio.
Home.sub: The right visual talent for your project, anywhere in the world.

Footer.tagline: A nomadic photo and video production studio. Present in major cities around the world.

meta.title: The Service — Admara Studio
meta.description: Talent sourcing and full coordination of photo and video productions, anywhere in the world.

hero.title: The right visual talent for your project.
hero.sub: ADMARA selects, prepares and coordinates every production, from first conversation to delivery.

audiences.title: For every visual project.
audiences.intro: Three non-exclusive typologies. The project defines the approach, not the other way around.

professional.label: Professional
professional.title: Brands, agencies, independents.
professional.body: Campaigns, product launches, recurring content. ADMARA frames the intent and coordinates execution.

creative.label: Creative
creative.title: Series, portfolios, editorials.
creative.body: Creators, personal brands, publications. Art direction is set in writing before the shoot.

personal.label: Personal
personal.title: Weddings, events, structured portraits.
personal.body: Moments that deserve a framed production. ADMARA treats every mission like a pro project, with a talent chosen for their eye.

howItWorks.title: Five steps, no grey areas.
howItWorks.intro: The Discovery Call and mission order writing are free. No payment is requested before the quote sent by Alyssia is signed off.

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.body: Fifteen to thirty minutes with Alyssia to understand the project, intent and context.

mission_order.title: Mission order
mission_order.body: ADMARA writes the framing document and the moodboard. Objective, deliverables, location, dates, style.

submission.title: Talent selection
submission.body: The mission is submitted to the ADMARA network. A talent accepts based on your brief.

coordination.title: Coordination
coordination.body: ADMARA runs logistics, scouting, casting, payment and briefs through to shoot day.

delivery.title: Delivery + support
delivery.body: Delivery on the timeline written into the quote. After-sales support is included.

selection.title: Open selection
selection.body: Worldwide network of photographers and videographers recruited one by one on portfolio and interview.

order.title: Framed mission order
order.body: Written document sent before every shoot. No ambiguity.

moodboard.title: Moodboard
moodboard.body: Art direction prepared in writing and visuals for the selected talent.

coordination.title: Integrated logistics
coordination.body: Scouting, permits, casting, payment, after-sales. ADMARA carries the coordination.

continuity.title: The relationship does not end with delivery.
continuity.p1: ADMARA keeps the follow-up wherever your activity moves next. Through a network of local contacts and an organisation carried end-to-end by ADMARA, coordination never falls back on you.
continuity.p2: Logistics, quality, pace: the same standard on-site and at distance.

cta.title: Describe your project.
cta.sub: A few short questions to frame your brief, then you book your Discovery Call.
cta.reassurance: Free Discovery Call. No data sold. European GDPR.

agent.initial_prompt: Hello. I'm ADMARA's digital concierge. A few short questions to frame your project. Is your project professional, creative or personal?
agent.confirmation: We have received your project. Book a slot to talk with Alyssia.

datePicker.hint: Pick a start date. You can add an end date if you have a precise window.

fallback.intro: The concierge isn't available right now. You can book a Discovery Call directly or write to Alyssia.

meta.title: ADMARA — Season 01
meta.description: A nomadic studio, a local network of curated talents, an international eye. Two founders, one method.

hero.title: A nomadic studio, a local network, a sharp eye.
hero.sub: ADMARA builds custom photo and video productions in every city it moves through.

why.title: ADMARA makes every photo and video production legible, end to end.
why.p1: Our network is built profile by profile. Fashion photographers, architecture videographers, portraitists working in natural light. Each talent arrives with their own eye, gear and specialisations. That diversity is what lets us address any kind of project.
why.p2: For every mission, ADMARA matches a specific project with the talent whose eye, equipment and experience serve the client's intent. The matching isn't algorithmic — it's decided after reading the brief, by Alyssia.
why.p3: ADMARA travels to meet talents in person, understand their world and build durable links in every city. That local sourcing, carried out with passion, becomes the foundation for every production that flows through the city afterwards. Without pretension.

aurelien.name: Aurélien
aurelien.bio: Aurélien has led digital projects and marketing strategies for demanding brands. An expert in AI agents and automation, he has managed complex digital systems and multi-stakeholder logistics. At ADMARA, he structures operations, tooling and the flow of every mission.

alyssia.name: Alyssia
alyssia.role: Co-founder — Art direction and client experience
alyssia.bio: Alyssia has worked in international hospitality, managed teams and led design and visual creation projects. Her eye was trained in environments where detail and consistency are non-negotiable. At ADMARA, she holds the client relationship, writes every mission order and selects the right talent for the project.

method.title: Four pillars, no mystery.
method.intro: These four pillars structure every ADMARA production, from brief to delivery.

selection.title: Open selection
selection.body: Worldwide network of photographers and videographers, recruited one by one on portfolio and interview. No automated catalogue.

order.title: Mission order
order.body: Written document sent before every shoot. Objective, deliverables, location, dates, usage rights: all written down.

moodboard.title: Moodboard
moodboard.body: Art direction prepared in writing and in visuals. The talent arrives with the right frame and the right intent.

coordination.title: Integrated coordination
coordination.body: Scouting, permits, casting, payment, after-sales. ADMARA carries the logistics so the client can focus on the project.

cta.title: Got a project in mind?
cta.sub: Describe it in a few short questions and we'll frame the next steps together.
